wikitext:
[]: Can't find vol 01 and 02 of Evangelion manga             Quote Post by Ajss » Wed Aug 18, 2021 5:24 am Hello, as the title says I've been looking for the evangelion manga first and second volume and I just couldn't find it, I'm from Spain, but I've also searched it on shops outside Spain and I'm just unable to find it physically (not even in online shops) , so, does somebody knows where could I find it or something? Thanks beforehand.

[]: Re: Can't find vol 01 and 02 of Evangelion manga             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Sep 26, 2021 11:01 am I'd say currently they really are out of stock, but they might get reorinted with current Eva popularity.
